title: Refactored files for packaging
body:
* New layout is more closely aligned with go calling
 * See bottom of client.py for examples
 * TODO breakout errors, images, and system __init__.py when they grow
   too large
 * Added github default python .gitignore
 * ApiConnection is the work horse class, mixin of ContextManager and
   HTTPConnection
 * Added support for UDS
 * TODO Support ssh:// and tcp://

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>
